headline: Bernstein Questions Sustainability of Kraft Heinz’s (KHC) New Growth Strategy
summary: The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) is included among the 10 No-Brainer Dividend Stocks to Buy. On June 3, Bernstein analyst Alexia Howard downgraded The Kraft Heinz Company (NASDAQ:KHC) to Underperform from Market Perform. She also lowered the price target on the stock to $21 from $25. In a research note, Howard said newly appointed CEO […]

headline: Kraft Heinz (KHC) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Context for Kraft Heinz Stock Kraft Heinz (KHC) is back in focus after recent share price moves, with the stock last closing at US$22.76. Investors are weighing this level against the company’s fundamentals and current valuation signals. See our latest analysis for Kraft Heinz. The recent 1-day share price decline of 2.44% and 7-day share price decline of 6.64% leave Kraft Heinz trading at US$22.76, while the 1-year total shareholder return is down 10.66%. headline: KHC Stock Heads For Worst Week Since March: Wall Street Analyst Sees Further Downside
summary: Bernstein’s Alexia Howard downgraded Kraft Heinz to ‘Underperform’ from ‘Market Perform’ with a price target of $21, cut lower from $25.
